{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322051946C5DE4A627E3719A8AF19"}"},"total":347},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7325609094205719308","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看！精彩不断！邱秋和萧晗的善良，在人吃人的末世还能秉此善心，帮助一切可帮之人，实属维能可贵！虽然也艰难险阻危险重重，却仍然带领人们苦苦挣扎，奔向美好生活！值得细看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705627199,"group_id":"7185152851855805501","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6jrCbmQWNpBJkLAsmCR7O8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"61207548542359","user_name":"嘻嘻哈哈美扬扬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"61207548542359","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7185152851855805501","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生＋末世＋空间＋双男主＋金手指】
天灾:酷暑，地震，暴雨，洪灾，疫病，严寒，饥荒，人祸等。
末世来临，人类将何去何从?
物竞天择，适者生存，优胜劣汰!
邱秋的一生是不幸的，父母离婚，各自重组家庭，对他不闻不问，邱秋只得半工半读，养活自己，好不容易坚持到考上大学，进校报道时，遇到儿时的邻家哥哥萧晗，本以为幸运降临，却遭遇末世，两人一路艰辛走来，好不容易进了避难所，却遇到昔日父母，二人对他冷漠异常，生怕被他缠上，之后，父亲邱志明，无意中得知他觉醒了空间异能，为了生存将其出卖，萧晗为救他而死，他为了给萧晗报仇，在研究所人员围上来时，选择自爆而亡，却不想重生回到末世前两个月，邱秋发现他的空间还在，这一次，他要提前做好准备，找到萧晗，和他在这末世好好生存下去。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ode10b0a974e646fad831abed45114f97~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"飞鸟和鱼不同路","author_id":"","book_id":"7185152851855805501","book_name":"末世重生之天灾人祸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3678人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7185163470550073890","read_count":"3678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1034433"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"222","tags":"双男主,现代,重生,空间,末世,囤物资,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7513afb5548414c2f6bcde7553869a70~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311987&x-signature=z%2B91SfIQMqXI0rJo%2FmY25HKgGzw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_inf 物竞天择，适者生存，优胜劣汰!
邱秋的一生是不幸的，父母离婚，各自重组家庭，对他不闻不问，邱秋只得半工半读，养活自己，好不容易坚持到考上大学，进校报道时，遇到儿时的邻家哥哥萧晗，本以为幸运降临，却遭遇末世，两人一路艰辛走来，好不容易进了避难所，却遇到昔日父母，二人对他冷漠异常，生怕被他缠上，之后，父亲邱志明，无意中得知他觉醒了空间异能，为了生存将其出卖，萧晗为救他而死，他为了给萧晗报仇，在研究所人员围上来时，选择自爆而亡，却不想重生回到末世前两个月，邱秋发现他的空间还在，这一次，他要提前做好准备，找到萧晗，和他在这末世好好生存下去。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ode10b0a974e646fad831abed45114f97~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"飞鸟和鱼不同路","author_id":"","book_id":"7185152851855805501","book_name":"末世重生之天灾人祸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3678人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7185163470550073890","read_count":"3678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1034433"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"222","tags":"双男主,现代,重生,空间,末世,囤物资,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7513afb5548414c2f6bcde7553869a70~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311987&x-signature=z%2B91SfIQMqXI0rJo%2FmY25HKgGzw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_inf
